description: Set parameters for a thermal analysis (only available if model configure thermal has been specified). The following keywords apply:

keywords.name: cmodel
keywords.description: Associates a thermal constitutive model with specified zones in the grid. It also allows querying of properties and states of constitutive models.

keywords.name: cmodel-assign-advection-conduction
keywords.description: Assign advection-conduction model.

keywords.name: cmodel-assign-anisotropic
keywords.description: Assign thermal anisotropic model.

keywords.name: cmodel-assign-hydration
keywords.description: Assign thermal hydration model.

keywords.name: cmodel-assign-isotropic
keywords.description: Assign thermal isotropic model.

keywords.name: cmodel-assign-null
keywords.description: Assign thermally null model.

keywords.name: cmodel-list
keywords.description: List the available thermal constitutive models and their properties.

keywords.name: implicit
keywords.description: Turns implicit mode on or off. By default implicit mode is off. Implicit mode requires a manually specified timestep. Note that specifying a timestep that is too large can cause the iterative matrix solver to fail to converge. (see Implicit Formulation)

keywords.name: list-information
keywords.description: List general information about the zone specific thermal calculation settings.

keywords.name: list-property
keywords.description: List the values of all thermal properties matching s in the range.

keywords.name: property
keywords.description: Assigns properties for the thermal constitutive models of all zones in the range. Any number of name value pairs may be assigned. Any constitutive model that has a matching property name will be assigned the value. The properties of the Advection-Conduction model are listed here, of the Anisotropic Heat Conduction model are listed here, of the Isotropic Heat Conduction model are listed here, and of the Hydration model are listed here.

keywords.name: property-distribution
keywords.description: Assigns a single property name to the thermal constitutive models of all zones in the range. The property value may be varied in space by using the following optional keyword values.

keywords.name: property-distribution-add
keywords.description: Add a to the property value. This keyword only applies to float type property values.

keywords.name: property-distribution-deviation-gaussian
keywords.description: A Gaussian distribution is used to assign the value randomly, with a mean value of a and a standard deviation of f. This keyword only applies to float type property values.

keywords.name: property-distribution-deviation-uniform
keywords.description: A uniform distribution is used to assign the value randomly, with a mean value of a and a standard deviation of f. This keyword only applies to float type property values.

keywords.name: property-distribution-gradient
keywords.description: Apply a gradient to the property value. This keyword only applies to float type property values.

keywords.name: property-distribution-multiply
keywords.description: Multiply the property value by a.

keywords.name: property-distribution-vary
keywords.description: Apply a linear variation to the property value. This keyword only applies to float type property values.

keywords.name: time-total
keywords.description: Specifies the accumulated zone thermal time, defined as the sum of all the timesteps over which zone thermal is active. Once set, thermal time will continue to accumulate with subsequent cycles.

keywords.name: zone-based-temperature
keywords.description: Turns zone-based temperatures on and off. By default temperatures are calculated and stored at gridpoints, and the zone temperature is the average gridpoint value. When this is turned on, the zone temperature is stored in the zone an the gridpoint temperatures are ignored. Temperatures must be set manually using the zone.temp FISH intrinsic.

keywords.name: cmodel
keywords.description: Associates a thermal constitutive model with specified zones in the grid. It also allows querying of properties and states of constitutive models.

keywords.name: cmodel-assign-advection-conduction
keywords.description: Assign advection-conduction model.

keywords.name: cmodel-assign-anisotropic
keywords.description: Assign thermal anisotropic model.

keywords.name: cmodel-assign-hydration
keywords.description: Assign thermal hydration model.

keywords.name: cmodel-assign-isotropic
keywords.description: Assign thermal isotropic model.

keywords.name: cmodel-assign-null
keywords.description: Assign thermally null model.

keywords.name: cmodel-list
keywords.description: List the available thermal constitutive models and their properties.

keywords.name: implicit
keywords.description: Turns implicit mode on or off. By default implicit mode is off. Implicit mode requires a manually specified timestep. Note that specifying a timestep that is too large can cause the iterative matrix solver to fail to converge. (see Implicit Formulation)

keywords.name: list-information
keywords.description: List general information about the zone specific thermal calculation settings.

keywords.name: property
keywords.description: Assigns properties for the thermal constitutive models of all zones in the range. Any number of name value pairs may be assigned. Any constitutive model that has a matching property name will be assigned the value. The properties of the Advection-Conduction model are listed here, of the Anisotropic Heat Conduction model are listed here, of the Isotropic Heat Conduction model are listed here, and of the Hydration model are listed here.

keywords.name: property-distribution
keywords.description: Assigns a single property name to the thermal constitutive models of all zones in the range. The property value may be varied in space by using the following optional keyword values.

keywords.name: property-distribution-add
keywords.description: Add a to the property value. This keyword only applies to float type property values.

keywords.name: property-distribution-deviation-gaussian
keywords.description: A Gaussian distribution is used to assign the value randomly, with a mean value of a and a standard deviation of f. This keyword only applies to float type property values.

keywords.name: property-distribution-deviation-uniform
keywords.description: A uniform distribution is used to assign the value randomly, with a mean value of a and a standard deviation of f. This keyword only applies to float type property values.

keywords.name: property-distribution-gradient
keywords.description: Apply a gradient to the property value. This keyword only applies to float type property values.

keywords.name: property-distribution-multiply
keywords.description: Multiply the property value by a.

keywords.name: property-distribution-vary
keywords.description: Apply a linear variation to the property value. This keyword only applies to float type property values.

keywords.name: time-total
keywords.description: Specifies the accumulated zone thermal time, defined as the sum of all the timesteps over which zone thermal is active. Once set, thermal time will continue to accumulate with subsequent cycles.

keywords.name: zone-based-temperature
keywords.description: Turns zone-based temperatures on and off. By default temperatures are calculated and stored at gridpoints, and the zone temperature is the average gridpoint value. When this is turned on, the zone temperature is stored in the zone and the gridpoint temperatures are ignored. Temperatures must be set manually using the zone.temp FISH intrinsic.

keywords.name: active
keywords.description: Turn the thermal module computations on or off. Active by default once the thermal process is configured.

keywords.name: implicit
keywords.description: Turn implicit thermal mode on or off. When on, the thermal solver advances temperature using an implicit timestep (set manually) rather than the explicit conduction timestep. Default off.

keywords.name: time-total
keywords.description: Set the total accumulated thermal-flow time.

keywords.name: zone-based-temperature
keywords.description: When on, temperatures are retrieved directly from the zone (which must have been assigned manually via FISH using zone.temp) rather than averaged from the gridpoints.

keywords.name: cmodel
keywords.description: Assign, query, or list the thermal constitutive model for zones in the range. Sub-keywords: assign, list, plus the five model name shortcuts (null, isotropic, anisotropic, advection-conduction, hydration).

keywords.name: cmodel-assign
keywords.description: Assign the named thermal constitutive model to all zones in the range.

keywords.name: cmodel-assign-null
keywords.description: Assign the null thermal model (no heat conduction in the zone).

keywords.name: cmodel-assign-isotropic
keywords.description: Assign the isotropic thermal model. Properties: conductivity, expansion, specific-heat.

keywords.name: cmodel-assign-anisotropic
keywords.description: Assign the anisotropic thermal model. Properties: conductivity-{1,2,3,xx,xy,xz,yy,yz,zz}, dip, dip-direction, expansion, rotation, specific-heat.

keywords.name: cmodel-assign-advection-conduction
keywords.description: Assign the advection-conduction thermal model (coupled heat transport with a prescribed fluid discharge field). Properties: conductivity, conductivity-effective, conductivity-fluid, density-fluid, expansion, expansion-fluid, gradient-{x,y,z}, specific-discharge-{x,y,z}, specific-heat, specific-heat-effective, specific-heat-fluid, temperature-reference.

keywords.name: cmodel-assign-hydration
keywords.description: Assign the hydration thermal model (cement-hydration heat source). Many properties including activation-energy, age-concrete-effective, conductivity, density-cement, expansion, hydration-grade, specific-heat, temperature-reference, time-hydration.

keywords.name: cmodel-list
keywords.description: List the available thermal constitutive models and their property names.

keywords.name: list
keywords.description: List thermal module state. Sub-keywords: information (default), property.

keywords.name: list-information
keywords.description: List the current Thermal Module settings (configured/active state, accumulated time, time step, implicit mode).

keywords.name: list-property
keywords.description: List the value of the named thermal property for zones in the range.

keywords.name: property
keywords.description: Set a thermal material property. The property name must match a property of the currently-assigned thermal constitutive model (see zone thermal cmodel list for the full list per model).

keywords.name: property-distribution
keywords.description: Set a thermal material property with an optional spatial distribution. Same property names as property; the optional distribution-block sub-keyword controls how the base value is varied: add, deviation-gaussian, deviation-uniform, gradient, multiply, vary.

keywords.name: property-distribution-add
keywords.description: Add the supplied value to the existing property value in each zone.

keywords.name: property-distribution-deviation-gaussian
keywords.description: Apply Gaussian-distributed deviation around the base value with standard deviation f.

keywords.name: property-distribution-deviation-uniform
keywords.description: Apply uniformly-distributed deviation around the base value with half-width f.

keywords.name: property-distribution-gradient
keywords.description: Apply a linear gradient v to the property value (optionally referenced to the supplied origin).

keywords.name: property-distribution-multiply
keywords.description: Multiply the existing property value in each zone by the supplied value.

keywords.name: property-distribution-vary
keywords.description: Apply a linear variation v to the property value across the range.

keywords.name: analytical
keywords.description: Configure and run the closed-form analytical thermal solver (used for verification and for problems with simple geometry/source layouts). Sub-keywords: isothermal-planes, list, property, solve, source, symmetry-planes, tolerance.

keywords.name: analytical-isothermal-planes
keywords.description: Declare which of the global x/y/z planes are isothermal boundaries (each axis takes a boolean).

keywords.name: analytical-symmetry-planes
keywords.description: Declare which of the global x/y/z planes are symmetry planes (each axis takes a boolean).

keywords.name: analytical-tolerance
keywords.description: Set the relative tolerance used by the analytical solver to decide when contributions from individual sources can be truncated.

keywords.name: analytical-list
keywords.description: List the current analytical-solver settings (isothermal-planes, symmetry-planes, tolerance, registered sources).

keywords.name: analytical-property
keywords.description: Set an analytical-solver material property. Recognised properties: conductivity, diffusivity.

keywords.name: analytical-solve
keywords.description: Run the analytical solver, summing contributions from all registered sources to compute temperatures at every gridpoint.

keywords.name: analytical-source
keywords.description: Define, list, or delete analytical heat sources. Sub-keywords: components, delete, grid, group, line, list, point, range, strength, time-start.

keywords.name: analytical-source-point
keywords.description: Add a point heat source at each supplied position v.

keywords.name: analytical-source-line
keywords.description: Add a line heat source discretised into i+1 collocation points between begin and end.

keywords.name: analytical-source-grid
keywords.syntax: grid begin <v> end-1 <v> end-2 <v> end-3 <v> segment <i1> <i2> <i3>
keywords.description: Add a volumetric (3D grid) heat source spanning the box defined by the begin corner and three edge vectors, discretised into (i1+1)*(i2+1)*(i3+1) collocation points.

keywords.name: analytical-source-strength
keywords.description: Heat strength of the source being added (W per source point).

keywords.name: analytical-source-time-start
keywords.description: Time at which the source being added becomes active (default 0).

keywords.name: analytical-source-components
keywords.description: List the individual component (point) entries that make up the most-recently-added source.

keywords.name: analytical-source-group
keywords.description: Assign group s to the source(s) being added.

keywords.name: analytical-source-list
keywords.description: List all currently-registered analytical sources.

keywords.name: analytical-source-delete
keywords.description: Delete analytical sources matching the range (or all sources if no range supplied).
